title: Shape-Synced Ring + Live Particle Preview
summary: Profile shape picker now updates the avatar ring shape in the preview. Particle effects have a live animated preview in the preview card (ring zone + bubble zone). Type/slider/color changes update the preview instantly. Clear renamed to Remove.
changes: Added _refreshPreviewParticles(cfg) module-level function — destroys old preview canvases ('__prev_ring_pt' / '__prev_bub_pt') and spawns compact particle canvases on #stylePreviewAvWrap (ring zone, max 10 particles) and #stylePreviewBubble (bubble zone, max 14 particles)

Profile shape selection now drives the avatar ring shape in the preview card: _renderStylePreview() sets CSS custom properties --prev-geo-r and --prev-geo-cp on #stylePreviewAvWrap, injecting a #stylePreviewAvWrap::before CSS rule via _applyOnceCSS('__prevGeoRing') that reads those vars — ring glow/spin/gradient follow hexagon/diamond/squircle/rounded shapes seamlessly
loadParticleSection: type-buttons now call _refreshPreviewParticles(readCurPtCfg(type)) on click so the preview animation updates immediately when switching particle type
loadParticleSection: all 5 sliders (count/size/speed/opacity/blur) and color picker call _refreshPreviewParticles debounced 120ms on input, so the preview stays in sync as you drag
loadParticleSection: Apply button calls _refreshPreviewParticles(newCfg) after saving — preview and real chat both reflect the new config
loadParticleSection: Clear/Remove button calls _refreshPreviewParticles(null) to destroy preview canvases
loadParticleSection: on initial render, calls _refreshPreviewParticles(_cfg) to show the already-saved config in the preview right away
Clear button label changed from 'Clear' to '🗑 Remove' for clarity
Particle section header updated to note 'preview updates live below'
_renderStylePreview(): particle preview refresh reads localStorage cp2p_particles_{uid} at each render call so the preview is always in sync
